data.html_text: @Mohamed Elsabry Actually the tip jar renaming happens only in rumble web when the user is logged in there, and not in the mobile app! When rename happens on rumble web, the issue on BE is that the api endpoint api/v1/seed-phrases/connect/verify used to fetch channels/tip jars in the app (in seed phrase mode) doesn't return the list with the updated names (it returns stale), that's what is needed to be fixed on BE! On FE, nothing needs to be changed for this ticket!
data.text: https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1210705323833399 Actually the tip jar renaming happens only in rumble web when the user is logged in there, and not in the mobile app! When rename happens on rumble web, the issue on BE is that the api endpoint api/v1/seed-phrases/connect/verify used to fetch channels/tip jars in the app (in seed phrase mode) doesn't return the list with the updated names (it returns stale), that's what is needed to be fixed on BE! On FE, nothing needs to be changed for this ticket!

data.html_text: @Alex Atrash, Thanks for the clarification. I'll retest the issue once the fix is released and update the ticket accordingly.
data.text: https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1211860479278729, Thanks for the clarification. I'll retest the issue once the fix is released and update the ticket accordingly.

data.html_text:
@Gocha Gafrindashvili For info, the fix is not adjusting channel names automatically. FE needs to make channel rename call whenever it detects mismatch or the need to update. The new endpoint is: 
PATCH /api/v1/channels/:channelId/tip-jar
I just finished testing on Dev, and testing has passed. When we deploy in Staging this will be ready to be consumed by the front end. cc @Eddy WM
data.text:
https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1211144546600148
For info, the fix is not adjusting channel names automatically. 
FE needs to make channel rename call whenever it detects mismatch or the need to update. 
The new endpoint is:

PATCH /api/v1/channels/:channelId/tip-jar


I just finished testing on Dev, and testing has passed. When we deploy in Staging this will be ready to be consumed by the front end.

cc https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1213406456321934

data.html_text: Since the final resolution requires FE-side integration, I’m assigning this back to @Ahsan Akhtar. Backend changes are completed, and the new endpoint is ready to be consumed by FE: PATCH /api/v1/channels/:channelId/tip-jar Please support with the FE integration. We can close the ticket after the end-to-end fix is completed and verified. cc: @Eddy WM
